creator: rlibby@freebsd.org
text:
I fixed this in upstream jemalloc (048c6679) [1] and committed the fix
to FreeBSD as r322332 [2].  I didn't know about this PR at the time.

The FreeBSD-head-amd64-gcc ci build is not yet completing successfully
(due to some toolchain issues) but it is now getting past this jemalloc
issue and all the way through buildworld, e.g. [3].

[1] https://github.com/jemalloc/jemalloc/commit/048c6679cd0ef1500d0609dce48fcd823d15d93b
[2] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=322332
[3] https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-amd64-gcc/2312/
